title: thinking.type=disabled should suppress Claude thinking output

messages.content: Answer only with the final number: 29 + 13.

expect.notes: 关闭 thinking 的定义是 Chat Completions 响应中不输出 thinking 内容，且 usage 中没有 reasoning_tokens/thinking_tokens > 0。Claude OpenAI 兼容层通常不暴露详细 thinking；该 case 单独验证 disabled 请求形态。
